author: Bastions
text:
Deliver EventCtx to native plugins via a describe-gated side channel

SPEC §5.1: a plugin opts in with wants_context:true; bl serializes the v1 EventCtx (schema_version/event/actor/repo/overrides) to a per-invocation 0600 ctx-file passed as a flag, RAII-removed after the call. Stdin Task wire byte-unchanged; non-opted plugins never see the flag (byte-identical).

The ctx-file delivery was chosen over a dedicated FD deliberately (tempfile dev-only; the diag FD precedent is child->parent). Honest v1: actor/event/repo/schema_version delivered now; task_before/commit are reserved additive keys per the schema contract; overrides accurate-empty until the CLI surface (bl-2bf7) lands.

Conformance: e2e (context-aware receives it; non-context never passed it, fixture hard-fails on regression) plus unit wire-shape coverage. Suite green, 100 percent coverage.
